 SELECT ps_partkey, MIN(ps_supplycost) AS min_supplycost
 FROM partsupp
 JOIN supplier ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
 JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
 JOIN region ON nation.n_regionkey = region.r_regionkey

 GROUP BY ps_partkey
)

JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey

 AND p.p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC, n.n_name, s.s_name, p.p_partkey

rewritten_query:
WITH subquery_total AS (
 SELECT SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) * 0.0001000000 AS threshold
 FROM partsupp ps
 INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
 INNER JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
 WHERE n.n_name = 'ROMANIA'
)
SELECT
 ps.ps_partkey,
 SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_value
FROM partsupp ps
INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
INNER JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE n.n_name = 'ROMANIA'
GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey
HAVING SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) > (SELECT threshold FROM subquery_total)
ORDER BY total_value DESC;

WITH jordan_total AS (
 SELECT SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) AS total
 FROM partsupp
 INNER JOIN supplier ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey

)

FROM lineitem
INNER JOIN part ON p_partkey = l_partkey

 AND (

 );

rewritten_query: WITH avg_balance AS (SELECT AVG(c_acctbal) AS avg_bal FROM customer WHERE c_acctbal > 0.00 AND substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) IN ('17', '22', '12', '18', '34', '25', '16')) SELECT cntrycode, COUNT(*) AS numcust, SUM(c_acctbal) AS totacctbal FROM (SELECT substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) AS cntrycode, c_acctbal, c_custkey FROM customer) AS c WHERE cntrycode IN ('17', '22', '12', '18', '34', '25', '16') AND c_acctbal > (SELECT avg_bal FROM avg_balance) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders WHERE o_custkey = c.c_custkey) GROUP BY cntrycode ORDER BY cntrycode;

rewritten_query: WITH filtered_customers AS (SELECT SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM 1 FOR 2) AS cntrycode, c_acctbal, c_custkey FROM customer WHERE SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM 1 FOR 2) IN ('15', '18', '31', '33', '32', '28', '16') AND c_acctbal > 0.00), avg_balance AS (SELECT AVG(c_acctbal) AS avg_bal FROM filtered_customers) SELECT cntrycode, COUNT(*) AS numcust, SUM(c_acctbal) AS totacctbal FROM filtered_customers WHERE c_acctbal > (SELECT avg_bal FROM avg_balance) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders WHERE o_custkey = filtered_customers.c_custkey) GROUP BY cntrycode ORDER BY cntrycode;
